div1.entryFree: Celerity, swiftness: hence hath offence his quick c. Meas. IV, 2, 113 (== its rapid spreading? or its alacrity?). the swift c. of his death, V, 399. motion of no less c. than that of thought, H5 III Chor. H5 III Chor. with great speed of judgment, ay, with c. Troil. I, 3, 330. she hath such a c. in dying, Ant. I, 2, 149. c. is never more admired than by the negligent, III, 7, 24.
